version_description: This is all of the aspects of the song in one piece, so that nobody has to switch between 2 for the entire song.

versions.version_description: Since no versions are published with the full songs chords, interludes and an accurate solo I decided to give it a shot. Slowed down the remastered version to 0.5 and broke down the solo note for note. Hope you enjoy and let me know if there is anything you think needs to be changed. No pride in this, just want to make sure everyone has access to an accurate version.
No Capo Version by my Guitar Teacher Johnathan.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Have You Ever Seen The Rain
